_provenance: Synthetic retention scenario. Derived from AC-M1F.1.3 (subquery DELETE LIMIT loop pattern, PA-M1F-5) and AC-M1F.1.4 (prune runs in app.py scheduler callback, BC-4). Counts are chosen to exercise the loop at batch_size=1000.
_scenario: 180-day retention. 5 rows older than cutoff. 3 rows within window. After rotation: 5 deleted, 3 remain.

subquery_pattern.sql_shape: DELETE FROM shadow_history WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM shadow_history WHERE ts_utc < ? ORDER BY ts_utc LIMIT ?)
subquery_pattern.comment: PA-M1F-5: portable subquery form — works on all SQLite builds without SQLITE_ENABLE_UPDATE_DELETE_LIMIT. Loop until rowcount==0.

scheduler_placement.comment: BC-4: prune runs in existing background scheduler callback alongside prune_old_triggers(), NOT in any Flask route handler.
